fields.title: YouTube Growth Mistakes to Avoid
fields.metaTitle: YouTube Growth Mistakes to Avoid | Learn | InstantViral
fields.metaDescription: Inconsistent niches, weak packaging, and ignoring retention graphs are common blockers. Fix packaging and retention before chasing upload volume or monetization
fields.imageAltText: YouTube Growth Mistakes to Avoid — InstantViral Learn featured image
fields.newsletterCopy: Inconsistent niches, weak packaging, and ignoring retention graphs are common blockers. Fix packaging and retention before chasing upload volume or monetization myths.
